content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma) as any,9	  providers: [10	    CredentialsProvider({11	      name: "credentials",12	      credentials: {13	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },14	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },15	      },16	      async authorize(credentials) {17	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {18	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");19	        }20	21	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({22	          where: {23	            email: credentials.email,24	          },25	        });26	27	        if (!user || !user.password) {28	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");29	        }30	31	        const isPasswordCorrect = await bcrypt.compare(32	          credentials.password,33	          user.password34	        );35	36	        if (!isPasswordCorrect) {37	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");38	        }39	40	        return user;41	      },42	    }),43	  ],44	  pages: {45	    signIn: "/auth/login",46	  },47	  session: {48	    strategy: "jwt",49	  },50	  callbacks: {51	    async session({ session, token }) {52	      if (token && session.user) {53	        (session.user as any).id = token.sub;54	        (session.user as any).role = token.role;55	      }56	      return session;57	    },58	    async jwt({ token, user }) {59	      if (user) {60	        token.role = (user as any).role;61	      }62	      return token;63	    },64	  },65	  secret: process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET,66	};
